title: Building Groups
description: Parcel grouping system for hierarchy and massing generation.

primary_core_ids.description: Parcel IDs for primary cores or landmarks.

secondary_tod_ids.description: Parcel IDs for secondary transit-oriented or mixed-use zones.

tertiary_living_ids.description: Parcel IDs for lower-intensity living, support, or infill areas.

open_space_ids.description: Parcel IDs reserved for open space or landscape.
